description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit constructed from wood, featuring six evenly spaced open shelves. The front face is entirely open, allowing easy access to each shelf compartment, while the sides and back are solid panels with a consistent wood grain texture. The shelves are flat and sturdy, suitable for storing books, decorative items, or other objects. The wood finish is a medium brown, giving the unit a warm, natural appearance. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, emphasizing its open and accessible design. The overall build suggests it is freestanding and intended for placement against a wall or in open spaces such as offices, libraries, or urban public areas.
description: A tall, open wooden shelving unit with six shelves and a warm brown finish, designed for accessible storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing six open shelves and the full depth of the unit.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid wood back panel, with no shelves or openings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wood panel.
